output.formatted:
Mortal Kombat

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?seriesName WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P176 wd:Q25958 ; wdt:P136 wd:Q8205 .
  ?movie wdt:P1992 ?series ; wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?releaseDate) , 1 , 4) = "1995")
  OPTIONAL {
    ?series rdfs:label ?seriesName .
    FILTER(lang(?seriesName) = "en")
  }
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns
